diagrams.title: Combinational vs Sequential Circuit Block Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the fundamental difference between combinational (no feedback) and sequential (with feedback) circuits
diagrams.purpose: Understanding fundamental architecture difference between combinational and sequential circuits

diagrams.title: 4-to-1 Multiplexer
diagrams.description: Circuit diagram showing how 4 inputs are selected using 2 select lines
elements: Data Inputs I0, I1, I2, I3
diagrams.purpose: Learning multiplexer implementation and selection logic

diagrams.title: Positive Edge-Triggered D Flip-Flop
diagrams.description: Internal circuit showing how D flip-flop works with clock edge detection
diagrams.purpose: Understanding flip-flop internals and edge-triggered behavior

diagrams.title: Mealy vs Moore State Machine
diagrams.description: Comparison of Mealy and Moore machine architectures showing where outputs are generated
diagrams.purpose: Understanding difference in output generation between Mealy and Moore machines
